title: blue cpvp pack 16x.
description: A 16x blue-themed PvP texture pack with custom items, armor, GUI, and Crystal PvP textures.
body:
**Blue CPvP Pack 16x**

Blue CPvP Pack 16x is a 16x Minecraft PvP texture pack. It includes blue-themed textures, custom PvP items, edited GUI elements, armor textures, and textures for Crystal PvP gameplay.

Included Features

- 16x textures
- Blue-themed PvP textures
- Custom swords and tools
- Custom armor textures
- Edited GUI
- Custom totem textures
- Crystal and anchor textures

Supported Gameplay

- Crystal PvP
- General PvP gameplay
- Multiplayer servers

Made by AYUSH20GAMING
